response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience as a Staff and Senior Engineer with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, mentoring, and distributed web systems, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. His technical background is predominantly in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which does not align well with the low-level cloud compute platform focus of this specific Technical Lead role.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring experience through Staff-level roles, organizing coding dojos, and teaching workshops.
Strong background in software design, architecture, and engineering best practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Experience with high-throughput distributed systems and microservices, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
concerns: Severe lack of C++ experience, possessing less than one year professionally compared to the 8-year minimum requirement.
Experience is heavily skewed towards full-stack web development and application-layer SaaS rather than foundational cloud compute platforms.
Limited evidence of managing large-scale, low-level compute infrastructure, hardware architecture, or core network storage systems.
